name: The New Dominus Viritas
description:
In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only duty...
Within the crimson halls of the Order of the Red Tear, faith is forged in fire and sacrifice. This newly founded Fortress Monastery stands as a bastion of the Adeptus Sororitas—a sisterhood of warriors bound by devotion, scarred by war, and united in service to the God-Emperor.
Its Sisters come from a thousand worlds, their voices and visages as varied as the stars, yet all kneel beneath the same sacred vow: Purge the heretic, uphold the Creed, and let no corruption endure.
But even in sanctified walls, shadows whisper. A new rank has risen among us—Dominus Viritas—and with it, unseen change stirs behind the veil of faith...
creator: AdeptusLongus
